shortdesc: Ask the mystic, get your fortune
desc: A mystical AI-powered fortune teller. Ask Esmeralda anything and receive a personalized, atmospheric response — part oracle, part entertainment, entirely immersive.
A word association game inspired by the NYT Connections puzzle. Group 16 words into 4 categories — sounds simple, gets tricky fast.
A clean, focused practice tool for the German Einbürgerung (naturalization) test. Browse all 310 official questions, filter by category, and drill the ones you miss.
Flashcard-based vocabulary trainer for the B1 German level. A simple, distraction-free way to build the word bank you need to pass the test.

shortdesc: Made a disclaimer? Put a coin in
desc: A playful accountability tool for meetings and conversations. Every time someone throws out a disclaimer instead of a real answer, the jar gets a coin. A lighthearted nudge toward clearer communication.
